basic_details.job_title: DIAC Deputy Counsel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Delhi International Arbitration Centre has released the official Deputy Counsel Notification 2026 on 29 April 2026 at the official website. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the DIAC Deputy Counsel Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of enrolment as an Advocate under the Advocates Act, 1961 with minimum 3 years post qualification experience can apply online from 01 May 2026 to 30 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Enrolled as an Advocate under the Advocates Act, 1961 with any State Bar Council, Three (03) years post qualification experience
qualification.details: Deputy Counsel: Essential: A person enrolled as an Advocate under the Advocates Act, 1961 with any State Bar Council and having three (03) years post qualification experience as on 01.05.2026. Desirable: (i) Diploma or Post Graduation/ LL.M. in Arbitration Law/ Commercial Law/ Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR); (ii) Research and Analytical Skills, writing ability and good knowledge of computer, including retrieval of desired information from various legal search engines/processes such as Manupatra, SCC Online, Westlaw, etc.

salary_details.details: Consolidated gross amount of Rs. 1,00,000/- (Rupees One Lakh only) per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DIAC Deputy Counsel Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DIAC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DIAC Deputy Counsel recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the DIAC Deputy Counsel recruitment is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Counsel post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for the Deputy Counsel position by the Delhi International Arbitration Centre (DIAC).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Counsel post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be enrolled as an Advocate under the Advocates Act, 1961 with any State Bar Council and possess three years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Deputy Counsel position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Counsel post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Counsel role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated gross amount of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DIAC Deputy Counsel recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Deputy Counsel position?
faq.answer: The Deputy Counsel position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01/2026/DC/DIAC.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection criteria for the Deputy Counsel role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an evaluation of the Curriculum Vitae followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
